description_long: This object is a classic record player with a rectangular wooden base and a partially open, dark-tinted dust cover made of transparent plastic. The top surface features a large, circular black turntable platter at the center, flanked by two white control knobs on the right side. A slender tonearm, likely made of metal or plastic, extends from the right rear corner and hovers above the platter, with a small stylus at its tip. The front panel is simple, with minimal visible controls or branding, and the device stands on four short, round feet. The dust cover is hinged at the back, allowing it to be lifted open or closed to protect the platter and controls. The overall design is functional and retro, with a mix of wood, plastic, and metal elements.
description: A retro record player with a wooden base, black turntable platter, white control knobs, and a partially open, dark-tinted dust cover. The tonearm and stylus are visible, and the device stands on four round feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open dust cover, central black platter, two white control knobs on the right, and the tonearm positioned above the platter.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angled dust cover, the platter's edge, and the tonearm extending from the rear right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the dust cover mostly closed, obscuring the platter and controls, and showing the back panel's simplicity.
description_view_3: Right side view with the dust cover open, clearly displaying the two white control knobs and the tonearm's base.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present and centrally located, the turntable platter is large, circular, and black with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. It occupies a significant portion of the top surface and appears to be made of plastic or metal, with a small white spindle at the center. No visible grooves or patterns are apparent.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, slender, and extends from the rear right corner toward the center of the platter. It appears to be made of metal or plastic, is black in color, and has a matte or semi-gloss finish. The tonearm is positioned above the platter, suggesting it is ready for use.
attribute_stylus: The stylus is visible as a small component at the end of the tonearm, appearing as a tiny, pointed element. It is likely made of metal and plastic and is attached to the tonearm, distinguishable as a separate part.
attribute_control_knobs: Two control knobs are present on the right side of the top surface. They are round, white, and moderately sized, likely made of plastic. No visible labels or markings are apparent from the images.
attribute_dust_cover: A dust cover is present, made of dark-tinted, transparent plastic. It is attached at the rear with hinges, allowing it to be opened or closed. In the images, the dust cover is shown partially open, and it covers the platter and controls when closed.
